title: B Site CT Boost Smoke
notes: Essential B execute utility piece. Completely blooms off the CT rotator alleyway and boost shelf.

title: B Site Coffins Smoke
notes: Blocks off lines from the platform/coffin defensive perimeter. Pair this with the CT smoke to completely seal B site.

title: A Site Pit Core Molotov
notes: Forces defensive anchors playing in the corner box of Pit out into unsafe visual territory near the lane balcony.

title: A Moto / Library Smoke (From Second Mid)
notes: Great for A-long wraps or lane pushes. Cuts off cross lines from rotators standing near Library/Moto paths.

title: Deep Banana Early Control Molotov
notes: Thrown instantly at round entry over B-site wall to deep-burn the bottom of Banana stairs, completely breaking basic T rushes.
